HGSS.692.0001:
I wasn’t feeling my best today,
that’s all!\f
We should trade phone numbers,
then we can battle again! [0200,0000]
HGSS.692.0002:
The next time we meet, I’ll be much
stronger, I promise!
HGSS.692.0003:
You’re just gonna win and run off?
That’s pretty low!
HGSS.692.0004:
I wasn’t feeling my best today,
that’s all!\f
We should trade phone numbers,
then we can battle again! [0200,0000]
HGSS.692.0005:
Did you come to pick up a Dusk Stone?
This is it...\f
Don’t be shy! This is getting kind of
awkward, so just take it already!\f
HGSS.692.0006:
Hey, now...
Am I really that scary to you?\f
You know that I know you’re on
Cycling Road, right?\f
If you’re going to come all the way out
here, you might as well talk in person!
HGSS.692.0007:
Bwa ha ha ha!
My [0100,000A,0000] has gotten so much\r
stronger. You would be stunned to see\r
it now!\f
Recently, we were battling a
[0100,000B,0000] and knocked it flat--\r
BOOM! Just like that!\f
Nothing scares us now...as long
as they’re low-enough level!
HGSS.692.0008:
My [0100,000A,0000] has gotten much
stronger, but we still let a wild\r
[0100,000B,0000] we were battling\r
run away!\f
What, you think it got away on us?
No way, man! We LET it run away!
HGSS.692.0009:
Recently we found a wild [0100,000B,0000]
by the roadside!\f
It just leaped out suddenly and
surprised me so much that I fell over!\f
Did I get hurt?\f
No--I landed on my Pokémon, and it
cushioned my fall!
HGSS.692.0010:
Whoa...
I can’t believe how buffed up I am now.\f
I’ll be showing off my moves on
[0104,0003,0000], so come by and get\r
stomped! I’ll be waiting to show you!
HGSS.692.0011:
What’s up with that?!
Didn’t you say you were going to come\r
out here and get schooled?!\f
Come on! I’m waiting on
[0104,0003,0000], so hurry up!
HGSS.692.0012:
After my Biker gang showed up on
Cycling Road, the atmosphere soured...\f
At least, that’s what some people
have been saying.\f
We’re not doing anything mean to
anyone, though!\f
All we’re doing is challenging strong
Trainers to Pokémon battles, that’s it!\f
People like you, for example!
HGSS.692.0013:
I was riding in the middle of the night,
and I found this thing called a\r
Dusk Stone!\f
You seem like someone with a lot of
promise, so I’d like to give it to you.\f
If you want it, I’ll be waiting on
[0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.692.0014:
You know, I went through a lot of
trouble saving you this Dusk Stone,\r
and you don’t even want it!\f
I’m on [0104,0003,0000], so come over
whenever. No... Come over now!
